title: Wrova Plastic Plates Set of 8 Reusable Dinner Plate 9 Inch Deep Plate Set, Unbreakable, Lightweight, Dishwasher & Microwave Safe for Kitchen - White
features: 9-Inch Plates: The Wrova 9-inch reusable dinner plate is made of food-grade PP, BPA-free, and reusable. It measures 9 inches (23 cm) in width and 1.4 inches (4 cm) in height. It is available as an 8-piece set of plates

Versatile Use: The Wrova plastic dinner plate has sufficient depth to hold saald, chip, cakes, fruit, and even soup dishes. Whether used indoors or outdoors, our plate can demonstrate its excellent quality

Unbreakable & Lightweight: Wrova plates sets are unbreakable and practical. No matter how many times dropped, it won’t break into pieces. Lightweight and Stack-able are advantages,they really suitable for kitchen and camping

Dishwasher & Microwave Safe: Wrova plastic plates for kitchen are Microwave safe and Dishwasher safe, temperature resistance ranges from -4°F to 248°F. Also available for Freezer. Easy to clean and store,our plates make your life more convenient

An Ideal Reusable Plates Option: This reusable dinner plate is an alternative to disposable dinnerware and can be used over and over again. Sturdy in daily use, this unbreakable plate shrugs off drops and bumps.

Wrova Plastic Plates: The 8-piece dinner plate set comes in a variety of different colors and is an excellent gift choice. Using these colorful plates at parties, dinners, or lunches not only adds fun to the meal but also creates a joyful atmosphere for the gathering
description: Product Description About Wrova Reusable Plates Set 9 INCH Wide range of uses They are suitable for every meal, serving pizza, sandwich, fruit and cake, dessert, salad, appetizer, etc. Whether indoor or out door, our plates will show their excellent quality. Smooth plate edge We have perfect craftsmanship and strict quality inspection to ensure that every plastic plate in your hand is qualified and free of burrs.
